requirements.summary: Wrap the entire application root with TranslationProvider in frontend/src/main.tsx so that useTranslation hook can access the translation context throughout the component tree
acceptanceCriteria: TranslationProvider wraps the App component in main.tsx
The application loads without the TranslationProvider error
All pages and components can access translation functions without errors

file_operations.description: Import TranslationProvider from contexts/TranslationContext and wrap the App component with TranslationProvider, placing it inside InternetIdentityProvider but outside or wrapping the RouterProvider. Preserve the existing QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers. Ensure the provider hierarchy allows all routed components to access the translation context.
